title: post api v1 scan queue full asynchronous scan
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/scan queues a full asynchronous cryptographic scan for a given domain and returns 202 with scan_id, domain, and status when authorized.

title: post api v1 scan batch queue portfolio scans
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/scan/batch queues portfolio scans for multiple domains within the allowed batch size and returns 202 with batch_id and jobs when authorized.

title: get api v1 results domain latest scan document
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/results/{domain} returns the latest scan document for the specified domain with status 200 when authorized.

title: get api v1 scans history recent scans for domain
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/scans/history returns recent scans for a specified domain with status 200 when authorized.

title: get api v1 scans diff compare two scans
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/scans/diff compares two scans and returns the TLS/asset deltas with status 200 when authorized.

title: get api v1 cbom summary cbom summary stats
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/cbom/summary returns CBOM summary statistics optionally filtered by domain with status 200 when authorized.

title: get api v1 cbom per app per component cbom
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/cbom/per-app returns per-component CBOM data enriched with threat and NIST context as an array with status 200 when authorized.

title: get api v1 cbom charts chart data
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/cbom/charts returns chart data for key lengths, certificate authorities, and ciphers with status 200 when authorized.

title: get api v1 crypto security tls crypto rows
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/crypto/security returns TLS and cryptographic rows for dashboard consumption as an array with status 200 when authorized.

title: get api v1 pqc posture asset level pqc posture
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/pqc/posture returns the asset-level PQC posture object from the latest scan with status 200 when authorized.
